user.title: Set up Home Suivi Élec
user.description: Add the HSE integration to track your electricity consumption.

abort.single_instance_allowed: Only one instance of HSE is allowed.

data_description.reference_sensor: HA entity used as the base for cost calculations.
data_description.energy_price: Average price per kWh in euros (e.g. 0.2516).

catalogue_offline.title: Sensor unavailable for a long time
catalogue_offline.description:
Sensor **{entity_id}** has been unavailable since {since}.

Available actions in HSE → Diagnostic:
- Mute (7/30/90 days) during a troubleshooting period.
- Mark removed if the sensor has been permanently removed.

Levels: warning after 15 min (or immediate if not_provided), error after 24h, action required after 48h.
